zh.Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可可拉法姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Michelgrove於1461年3月28日出生在英國素可易阿利時，她的父親John Michelgrove25歲，母親Anne Sidney22歲。她於1474年與John Shelley在英國素可可拉法姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1513年7月30日在英國素可可拉法姆享年52歲，埋葬在英國素可可拉法姆。

zh-hans.Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰素可可拉法姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Michelgrove于1461年3月28日出生在英国素可易阿利时，她的父亲John Michelgrove25岁，母亲Anne Sidney22岁。她于1474年与John Shelley在英国素可可拉法姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1513年7月30日在英国素可可拉法姆享年52岁，埋葬在英国素可可拉法姆。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Michelgrove was born on 28 March 1461, in Earnley, Sussex, England, her father, John Michelgrove, was 25 and her mother, Anne Sidney, was 22. She married John Shelley in 1474, in Clapham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 30 July 1513, in Clapham, Sussex, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Clapham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Michelgrove est née le 28 mars 1461, à Earnley, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Michelgrove, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne Sidney, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Shelley en 1474, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 juillet 1513, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Michelgrove am 28. März 1461 in Earnley, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Michelgrove 25 und ihre Mutter Anne Sidney 22. Sie hat 1474 in Clapham, Sussex, England John Shelley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Juli 1513 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Clapham, Sussex, England und wurde in Clapham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Michelgrove è nata il il 28 marzo 1461 nel Earnley, Sussex, England, sua padre, John Michelgrove, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Anne Sidney, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Shelley nel 1474, nel Clapham, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 30 luglio 1513, nel Clapham, Sussex, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Clapham, Sussex, England.

ja.Earnley, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスエアルンリー
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Michelgroveが1461年3月28日にイギリススセックスエアルンリーで生まれた時，父John Michelgroveは25歳，母Anne Sidneyは22歳であった。1474年にイギリススセックスクラファムでJohn Shelleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1513年7月30日にイギリススセックスクラファムで52歳で死去し，イギリススセックスクラファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Michelgrove(이)가 1461년 3월 28일 영국 수세스 에른리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Michelgrove(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Sidney(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1474년 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 John Shelley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 7월 30일 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 클라프아에 묻혔다.

pt.28 March 1461–30 July 1513: 28 de março de 1461–30 de julho de 1513
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Michelgrove nasceu em 28 de março de 1461, em Earnley, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Michelgrove, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne Sidney, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Shelley em 1474, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de julho de 1513, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Michelgrove родилась 28 марта 1461 г. в местности эарнли, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Michelgrove было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Sidney, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Shelley в 1474 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 30 июля 1513 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия.

es.28 March 1461–30 July 1513: 28 de marzo de 1461–30 de julio de 1513
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Michelgrove nació el 28 de marzo de 1461, en Earnley, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Michelgrove, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anne Sidney, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Shelley en 1474, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 30 de julio de 1513, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
